blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,782 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 23.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
